summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatEmbed AI Domain Verification System. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows working correctly including signup website field, dashboard domain banner, and domain verification page with Meta Tag and DNS TXT methods.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register requires website_url field (422 on missing)
POST /api/auth/register with website_url returns domain, domain_verified, domain_verification_token
POST /api/auth/register normalizes URLs (adds https:// if missing)
POST /api/auth/register extracts domain from full URL with path
GET /api/auth/me returns domain, domain_verified, domain_verification_token, website_url fields
POST /api/auth/login returns domain, domain_verified fields
GET /api/domain/status returns current domain verification status
GET /api/domain/status returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
POST /api/domain/init sets/updates website URL and returns verification instructions
POST /api/domain/init normalizes URL without https://
POST /api/domain/init rejects empty website URL with 400
POST /api/domain/init rejects invalid domain (no TLD) with 400
POST /api/domain/init returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
POST /api/domain/verify with method=meta_tag returns verified=false with helpful details
POST /api/domain/verify with method=dns_txt returns verified=false with helpful details
POST /api/domain/verify rejects invalid method with 400
POST /api/domain/verify returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
GET /api/chatbot-public/{id} returns domain_verified and allowed_domain from owner
Signup page has required Website URL field with placeholder 'https://www.ihre-firma.de'
Signup page shows hint text 'Die Domain Ihrer Website wird nach der Registrierung verifiziert'
Dashboard shows yellow domain verification banner for unverified domains
Dashboard banner shows 'Verify Now →' link pointing to /dashboard/verify-domain
Sidebar has Domain link pointing to /dashboard/verify-domain
Domain Verification page shows status card (Domain Not Verified)
Domain Verification page Step 1: Set Website with URL input and Update button
Domain Verification page Step 2: Verify Ownership with Meta Tag and DNS TXT Record tabs
Domain Verification page shows code blocks with copy buttons for meta tag and DNS record
Domain Verification page Meta Tag verify button triggers API call and shows result
Domain Verification page DNS TXT verify button triggers API call and shows result
Domain Verification page Update button changes domain and updates status card
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during registration tests (test_reg_no_website_*, test_reg_domain_*, test_reg_normalize_*, test_reg_extract_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Domain verification system is fully implemented and working. Test user test@chatembed.de has domain='example-bakery.de' with domain_verified=false. Domain verification actually checks real websites/DNS - since we can't add meta tags or DNS records to external sites, verification will fail gracefully with helpful error messages. Email sending is MOCKED - tokens are returned in API responses for demo mode.

mocked_apis.email_delivery: Email sending is mocked - verification tokens are returned directly in API responses (mock_verify_token, mock_token) for demo/testing purposes
mocked_apis.domain_verification: Domain verification actually checks real websites/DNS - not mocked. Verification fails gracefully for external sites without proper meta tags or DNS records.

methods: meta_tag - checks for meta tag on website
domain_verify.note: Verification fails gracefully for external sites with helpful error messages

features: Step 1: Set Website with URL input
Step 2: Verify Ownership with Meta Tag and DNS TXT tabs

sidebar_domain_link.description: Domain link present in sidebar navigation pointing to /dashboard/verify-domain
